Asset role: standalone inventory icon. Icon concept: a classic antique-style key with a round decorative bow at the top and two clean teeth at the bottom, warm golden brass or aged bronze metallic color, soft top-left highlight giving metallic reflection, subtle warm shadow on the right side for depth, thick soft outline for readability at small size. Edge margin rule: the key is centered with generous empty matte space between the key outline and the canvas edge on all four sides, so the key silhouette is fully contained and never truncated by the image border. Composition: one centered object filling roughly 60 percent of the canvas, simple readable silhouette at 64px, rich but clean colors, no other objects or background details.
